auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password

orders.loadError: Failed to load orders. Please try again.

users.profileSubtitle: Update your name and email display.
users.changePasswordSubtitle: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
users.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

products.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected product(s)? This action cannot be undone.
products.visibilityDesc: Choose "All staff" = whole department can view. Choose specific people = only they can view.
products.editDialogProductFieldsHint: Saves name, code, prices, and status only.
products.editDialogVisibilityHint: Applies who can see this product by department. Use “Save view permission” — it does not change product fields.
products.productUpdateError: Could not save product details. Please try again.
products.productVisibilityDialogSubtitle: Choose who can see this product by department. Save with the button below.
products.viewPermissionSaveError: Could not save view permission. Please try again.
products.salePeriodsDesc: A product can have multiple sale periods; ad links are attached to each period.
products.salePeriodOverlapError: This date range overlaps with another sale period.
products.salePeriodDeleteConfirm: Delete this sale period? Ad links in this period will be affected.
products.addSalePeriodFirst: Create at least one sale period before adding ad links.

salePeriodStatusReport.title: Sale period status report
salePeriodStatusReport.subtitle: Per period: product (hover for purchase/selling price, fee/tax %, shipping per order), period vs sale days, forms vs orders, revenue (hover for formula), total ads (hover for breakdown), cost stack, and profit with margin. Total ads is the sum of ads amounts in each period’s cost log.
salePeriodStatusReport.loadError: Could not load the status report.
salePeriodStatusReport.profitBandTooltipNoMargin: No profit margin % (no revenue or undefined)

profitColors.title: Profit row colors
profitColors.subtitle: Thresholds and colors are stored on the server and apply for everyone. They are compared to profit as a percent of revenue.
profitColors.readOnlyHint: You can view these settings; only users with permission to edit products can change them.
profitColors.bandsHint: Negative: at or below 0%. Low: above 0% through the first threshold (inclusive). Reach target: above the first through the second threshold (inclusive). Super: above the second threshold.
profitColors.tooltipLabelsHint: Shown when hovering a colored row on the status report. You can use any wording (e.g. “Low profit”, “Reach target”).
profitColors.tooltipLabelLow: Text for low band (> 0% … first threshold)
profitColors.tooltipLabelSuper: Text for super band (above second threshold)

errors.lowMaxInvalid: The first threshold must be a number ≥ 0.
errors.reachMaxInvalid: The second threshold must be greater than the first.
errors.colorInvalid: Each color must be a #RRGGBB hex value.
errors.labelInvalid: Each tooltip label must be non-empty.

salePeriodImport.title: Import sale periods
salePeriodImport.subtitle: Upload an Excel file (.xlsx). ads_run_cost is total ads spend; ads_run_days is how many cost log rows to create (equal split, e.g. 4,000,000 over 2 days → two rows of 2,000,000). Use ads_run_days 0 when ads_run_cost is 0. Marketing matches name or email (marketing role). Product code must exist and be visible to you. A toast shows the outcome after import.
salePeriodImport.noPermission: You need permission to edit products to import sale periods.
salePeriodImport.templateDesc: The sample file uses ads_run_cost 4,000,000 with ads_run_days 2 (two cost entries). Replace codes and emails with real data.
salePeriodImport.clientErrorsTitle: {{count}} row(s) failed validation in the file
salePeriodImport.readyToImport: {{count}} row(s) are valid and ready to import.
salePeriodImport.resultSummary: Created {{periods}} sale period(s) and {{entries}} ads cost entry/entries.
salePeriodImport.serverRowErrorsTitle: Some rows could not be imported:

productImport.title: Import products
productImport.subtitle: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) with columns: name, code, status (0 = disabled, 1 = active), unit, purchase_price, unit_price, vat_percent, vat_code, weight_gram. Leave optional cells blank to use the same defaults as manual create (unit cái, numeric fields 0, vat_code empty). Processing runs in the background; you will receive a notification when it finishes.
productImport.noPermission: You need permission to edit products to import products.
productImport.templateDesc: Download the example file. It includes sample values for unit, prices, VAT, vat_code, and weight (grams). Replace rows with your products.
productImport.clientErrorsTitle: {{count}} row(s) failed validation in the file
productImport.readyToQueue: {{count}} row(s) are valid and ready to queue.
productImport.processingHint: Import is running in the background. This page will update when it finishes.
productImport.serverRowErrorsTitle: Some rows could not be imported:

salePeriodList.periodProgress: Days (elapsed / total Ads run days / total)

salePeriodCosts.sectionDesc: Each entry records the time and ads spend only. Operating total = number of entries × operating cost per entry on the period (add/edit period).
salePeriodCosts.entryInvalid: Enter a valid ads spend amount.
salePeriodCosts.updateCostEntryError: Could not save cost entry changes.
salePeriodCosts.createError: Could not save the cost entry.
salePeriodCosts.summaryOperatingPeriodNote: Formula: {{count}} × {{unit}} (cost entries × operating cost per entry on the period).

createProductPage.title: Create product
createProductPage.subtitle: Enter name and pricing. Product code is optional (auto-generated if left blank). Choose who can see this product by role, or leave “All viewer roles” (default). You can refine per-person access when editing.
createProductPage.noPermission: You do not have permission to create products.
createProductPage.createError: Could not create the product. Please check the form and try again.
createProductPage.invalidNumbers: Enter valid numbers: prices and VAT (0–100) must be zero or greater; weight must be a whole number (grams).
createProductPage.visibilityRestrictHint: Uncheck roles that should not see this product in the list.
createProductPage.visibilityPickOneRole: Select at least one role, or choose “All viewer roles”.

addSalePeriodPage.title: Add product sale period
addSalePeriodPage.subtitle: Select product, marketing rep, sale dates, period pricing (including operating cost), and optionally an initial ads entry.
addSalePeriodPage.costSnapshotDesc: Optional: records the time and ads spend only. Operating cost is set in period pricing above.
addSalePeriodPage.searchProductPlaceholder: Type name or code to search...
addSalePeriodPage.adLinkSectionDesc: You can add one ad link for this period right after creating it.
addSalePeriodPage.noPermission: You do not have permission to add product sale periods.
addSalePeriodPage.periodAndAdLinkCreated: Sale period and ad link created.
addSalePeriodPage.adLinkCreateError: Sale period created but failed to add ad link.
addSalePeriodPage.costEntryCreateError: Sale period was created but the cost entry could not be saved.
addSalePeriodPage.periodPricingInvalid: Enter valid purchase cost, selling price, shipping cost, fee/tax, and operating cost (≥ 0).
addSalePeriodPage.costEntryInvalid: Enter a valid ads spend amount for the cost snapshot.

salePeriods.startAtLockedPast: Start date cannot be changed because this sale period has already begun.

dashboard.quickAccessDesc: Manage orders, view status and print.
